title: Oulu Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Oulu with a Z-Score of -3.06. Temperatures are critically low, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current cold snap in Oulu is causing significant disruptions. 
 The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a critical level of severity. 
 Heating demand is high, with 11.7 HDD GG, and humidity is at 80% with moderate winds of 13.7 km/h.
conclusion: Implement emergency protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
